data.title: XLM price prediction: Stellar aims for $0.25 breakout; trading at $0.23, RSI 51.14. Technicals point to $0.22 support or $0.25 resistance soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Stellar (XLM) is currently trading at $0.23 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 51.14. Analysis indicates a possible movement towards the $0.25 resistance level or a retracement to the $0.22 support level in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: TRX expected to reach $0.32-$0.35 by February with $0.31 as current resistance level in short to medium term.
data.description: Summary of TRX Price Forecast:- Short-term goal within a week: $0.32 - Medium-term prediction over a month: Between $0.32 and $0.35 - Bullish breakout point: $0.31 (present resistance level)

data.title: Litecoin aims for $87-95 rebound despite current bearish trend, trades at $75.07. Analysts predict $120-125 breakthrough. Technical analysis hints at $87-95 by month-end if support is maintained.
data.description: The current trading price of LTC stands at $75.07, facing a downward trend in the market. Despite this, prominent analysts are looking towards a potential breakout level between $120 and $125. Technical analysis indicates a possible recovery to the range of $87 to $95 by the end of the month, provided that crucial support levels are maintained.

data.title: ATOM likely to reach $2.75 by Jan 2026, currently at $2.54. RSI is 60.8, resistance seen at $2.74.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently trading at $2.54 with neutral momentum. Technical indicators are pointing towards a possible upward movement to the $2.75 range. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 60.8, suggesting there is potential for further growth. However, a significant resistance level is observed at $2.74. Investors should closely monitor the price action as it approaches this key resistance point.

data.title: By February 2026, BCH could reach $720-$750, with short-term target of $635-$645, bullish breakout level at $660, key support at $570.
data.description: Estimated price movements for Bitcoin Cash (BCH) suggest a short-term target range of $635 to $645 over the next week, with a medium-term forecast ranging between $720 and $750 within a month. The bullish breakout point is identified at $660, while critical support is acknowledged at $570. These predictions provide insights for potential investors in the BCH market.

data.title: UNI price could reach $6.29 in February if $5.30 support holds, as per analysis. Neutral RSI signals critical breakout levels for Uniswap.
data.description: The forecast for UNI suggests a potential rebound to $6.29 if the current support of $5.30 remains intact. An analysis of its technical indicators indicates a neutral RSI with crucial breakout levels on the horizon for Uniswap.

data.title: Chainlink (LINK) expected to break $15.50 by Feb 2026, currently trading at $13.93 with bullish momentum.
data.description: The stock LINK is currently trading at $13.93 and shows bullish MACD momentum, indicating a possible increase to the range of $15.50-$16.50 in the next 4-6 weeks. Technical indicators are aligning in favor of an upward movement in the coming weeks.

data.title: AVAX price aims for $15.50-$16.50 by early Feb, trading at $14.36. Mixed signals, RSI 57.95. Predicted in 2-3 weeks.
data.description: The digital currency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently priced at $14.36, with market analysts predicting potential price targets of $15.50 to $16.50 in the next 2 to 3 weeks. Technical analysis reveals a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 57.95, although the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum is causing conflicting signals in the market.

data.title: Trident Resources starts 10,000m winter drilling at Contact Lake Gold Project in Saskatchewan. Goal: confirm gold mineralization, expand zones & test new targets. TSX-V: ROCK, OTCQB: TRDTF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 15, 2026, Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V:  ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) has begun a winter diamond drilling program covering 10,000 meters at the Contact Lake Gold Project in northern Saskatchewan's La Ronge Gold Belt. The program's objectives include verifying past gold mineralization findings, enlarging established gold zones, and evaluating new targets identified through current geological analyses.

data.title: Amplifon named global Top Employer 2026, one of 17 worldwide, showcasing HR management excellence across Switzerland, India, China, and Asia-Pacific.
data.description: In 2026, a total of 17 companies globally were distinguished for their exceptional human resources management practices. This accreditation, a first for the Asia-Pacific region, adds to existing recognitions in Europe, North America, and Latin America. Countries such as Switzerland, India, and China were among those included in this prestigious list.

data.title: Novo Nordisk Foundation grants DKK 5.5 billion (EUR 736 million) to BioInnovation Institute to boost innovation in Europe.
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on January 15, 2026, the Novo Nordisk Foundation announced the allocation of a substantial amount of funding to the BioInnovation Institute (BII), totaling up to DKK 5.5 billion (EUR 736 million). This significant investment aims to support BII's initiatives in life sciences and deep tech innovation, allowing for the institute's expansion and further advancements in the field.
